createElementAudit.principle: Large public UI structure must live in HTML/XML or template. Small state/behavior may use JS.

unclassifiedElementAudit.principle: Unclassified createElement usage must be reviewed by occurrence. Small behavior/runtime construction may stay in JS; public chrome/UI structure should move to HTML/XML or purpose-specific templates.

reviewedOccurrences.context: legacy HTML strip helper: div used for innerHTML set then textContent extraction
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Temporary div created only for parsing/stripping Blogger feed HTML content. Never inserted as visible public UI chrome. Legacy bridge pattern.

reviewedOccurrences.context: dynamic comment status element with role=status and aria-live=polite
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Dynamically created status message area that only appears when status updates are needed. Content is entirely runtime-driven.
Temporary off-screen textarea for copy-to-clipboard fallback. Positioned off-screen, removed after use. Not visible UI chrome.

reviewedOccurrences.context: comment replies context avatar image with runtime-driven src
reviewedOccurrences.reason: The image src and alt are data-driven runtime values from the comment author. Not static public chrome structure.

reviewedOccurrences.context: graceful fallback when saved-listing-empty template is unavailable
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Only created when cloneTemplateElement('gg-empty-state-saved-articles') fails. Not the primary UI generation path; template cloning is attempted first.

reviewedOccurrences.context: graceful fallback when related-posts-item template is unavailable
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Only created when cloneTemplateElement for related posts template fails. Not the primary UI generation path.

reviewedOccurrences.context: graceful fallback when related-posts dots template is unavailable
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Only created when cloneTemplateElement for dots template fails. Not the primary UI generation path.

reviewedOccurrences.context: hidden measurement iframe for route preloading/performance matrix
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Hidden iframe (hidden=true, aria-hidden=true, tabindex=-1) used for infrastructure performance measurement. Not visible public chrome.

reviewedOccurrences.context: dynamic script loader for store discovery runtime module
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Lazy-loads the store discovery JS bundle at runtime. Not UI chrome; this is infrastructure script loading.

reviewedOccurrences.context: dynamic script loader for store core compat entry
reviewedOccurrences.reason: Bootstraps the store core JS bundle. Not UI chrome; this is entry-point script loading infrastructure.

allowlist.reason: Legacy HTML strip helper: div.innerHTML set then read textContent — used to strip markup from Blogger feed content. Temporary legacy bridge.
Legacy HTML parsing fallback for Blogger post body extraction — fallbackDoc.documentElement.innerHTML = html. Temporary legacy bridge.
Legacy outline preview text extraction reads innerHTML from already-parsed DOM nodes (fallback after textContent). Read-only, not generation. Temporary legacy bridge.
Studio error display: single-line error message insertion on catastrophic failure. Small error text, not large public UI chrome.
Legacy HTML strip helper in landing inline script: div.innerHTML set then read textContent — used to strip markup from feed labels. Same pattern as legacy-app bridge.

Landing discovery command panel render: commandResults.innerHTML='' (clear) and button.innerHTML for discovery result template with gg- class names. Legacy inline script pattern. Migration candidate for TASK-002M.
